# JFrog

> JFrog is the trust layer for the agentic software supply chain — the single source of truth for every artifact, model, agent skill, and MCP server enterprises ship. JFrog uniquely combines binary management, Appsec, AI security, governance and compliance into one platform, enabling enterprises to deliver trusted software at speed.

---

### Documentation

[JFrog Documentation](https://docs.jfrog.com): Complete platform documentation, API references, and getting started guides.

[JFrog REST APIs](https://docs.jfrog.com/api): Complete API documentation for all products.

[JFrog CLI](https://docs.jfrog.com/cli): Command-line interface documentation.

[JFrog Security Docs](https://docs.jfrog.com/security/docs/cursor-1): Security documentation including Cursor integration.

---

### Key Company Information

[Homepage](https://jfrog.com/): The main entry point to the JFrog website.

[About Us](https://jfrog.com/about/): Learn about the company, mission, and leadership.

[Careers](https://join.jfrog.com/): Find information on job opportunities at JFrog.

[Contact Us](https://jfrog.com/contact-us/): Get in touch with the JFrog team.

---

### Security Resources

[JFrog Blog](https://jfrog.com/blog/): Security research, product updates, partnerships, and thought leadership.

[JFrog Security Research](https://research.jfrog.com/): The latest research in software and AI vulnerabilities.

[DevSecOps Hub](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/devsecops/): Guides and resources for implementing DevSecOps.

---

### Products

[JFrog Platform](https://jfrog.com/platform/): Complete software supply chain platform.

[JFrog Artifactory](https://jfrog.com/artifactory/): Universal artifact and ML model repository management.

[JFrog Xray](https://jfrog.com/xray/): Security scanning and vulnerability management.

[JFrog Curation](https://jfrog.com/curation/): Curate software packages and ML models entering your organization.

[JFrog Advanced Security (JAS)](https://jfrog.com/advanced-security/): Supply chain exposure scanning, SAST, secrets detection, and IaC security.

[JFrog AppTrust](https://jfrog.com/apptrust/): Application risk governance.

[JFrog AI Catalog](https://jfrog.com/ai-catalog/): Discover, govern, and secure your AI ecosystem.

[JFrog ML](https://jfrog.com/jfrog-ml/): Build, train, serve, and monitor AI/ML models.

[JFrog Runtime](https://jfrog.com/runtime/): Real-time visibility into runtime vulnerabilities.

[JFrog Fly](https://jfrog.com/fly/): Zero-config, agentic software delivery for small teams.

---

### AI & Agentic Capabilities

[JFrog MCP Registry](https://jfrog.com/ai-catalog/mcp-registry/): MCP governance and security at enterprise scale.

[JFrog Agent Skills Registry](https://jfrog.com/beta-signup/agent-skills-registry/): Enterprise-governed skills for trusted AI agents.

### Developer Resources

[Integrations](https://jfrog.com/integrations/): CI/CD tool integrations and plugins.

[JFrog IDE Plugins](https://docs.jfrog-applications.jfrog.io/): Bring the JFrog Platform into developer IDEs.

[JFrog Academy](https://academy.jfrog.com/): Free training courses and certification prep.

[FrogBot](https://github.com/jfrog/frogbot): Git bot for automated security scanning in repositories.

### Community & Events

[JFrog Community](https://jfrog.com/community): Forums, user groups, and community resources.

[Demo Center](https://jfrog.com/demo-center/): On-demand JFrog demo videos.

[swampUP Conference](https://swampup.jfrog.com/all-events): JFrog's annual developer conference.

---

### Learning & Glossary

[Shadow AI](https://jfrog.com/learn/ai-security/shadow-ai/): What is shadow AI and how to govern it.

[MCP Registry](https://jfrog.com/learn/ai-security/mcp-registry/): What is an MCP Registry and why it matters for AI security.

[Agentic Supply Chain](https://jfrog.com/learn/ai-security/agentic-supply-chain/): Understanding the agentic software supply chain.

[Agent Skills Repository](https://jfrog.com/learn/ai-security/agent-skills-repository/): What is an agent skills repository.

[SBOM](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/sbom/): Software Bill of Materials explained.

[Software Attestation](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/software-attestation/): What is software attestation.

[Software Governance](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/software-governance/): Software governance best practices.

[SLSA Framework](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/slsa-framework/): Supply chain levels for software artifacts.

[Software Provenance](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/software-provenance/): What is software provenance.

[GRC](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/grc/): Governance, risk, and compliance in software.

[SSDF](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/ssdf/): Secure software development framework.

[DevGovOps](https://jfrog.com/learn/grc/devgovops/): What is DevGovOps.

[SCA](https://jfrog.com/learn/sdlc/sca/): Software composition analysis explained.

[SAST](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/sast/): Static application security testing.

[Vulnerability Management](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/vulnerability-management/): Vulnerability management best practices.

[Vulnerability Scanning](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/vulnerability-scanning/): How vulnerability scanning works.

[CVE](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/cve/): Common vulnerabilities and exposures explained.

[CVSS](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/cvss/): Common vulnerability scoring system.

[Application Security Testing](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/application-security-testing/): Types and best practices.

[Application Security](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/application-security/): Application security overview.

[Secrets Management](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/secrets-management/): Managing secrets in software development.

[Zero-Day Vulnerability](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/zero-day-vulnerability/): What is a zero-day vulnerability.

[Code Signing](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/code-signing/): Code signing explained.

[Container Security](https://jfrog.com/learn/cloud-native/container-security/): Securing containers in production.

[Container Runtime Security](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/container-runtime-security/): Runtime security for containers.

[Shift Left](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/shift-left/): Shift left security practices.

[Malware in the Software Supply Chain](https://jfrog.com/learn/devsecops/malware-software-supply-chain/): How malware enters the supply chain.

[MLOps](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/mlops/): Machine learning operations explained.

[Model Registry](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/model-registry/): What is a model registry.

[LLMOps](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/llmops/): Operations for large language models.

[CI/CD for Machine Learning](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/cicd-for-machine-learning/): Continuous integration and delivery for ML.

[Fine-Tuning LLMs on Custom Datasets](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/fine-tuning-llms-on-custom-datasets/): How to fine-tune LLMs.

[ModelOps](https://jfrog.com/learn/mlops/modelops/): What is ModelOps.

[Artifact Management](https://jfrog.com/learn/devops/artifact-management/): Managing software artifacts.

[Agentic Repository](https://jfrog.com/learn/devops/agentic-repository/): What is an agentic repository.

[CI/CD](https://jfrog.com/learn/devops/ci-cd/): Continuous integration and continuous delivery.

[Container Registry](https://jfrog.com/learn/cloud-native/container-registry/): What is a container registry.

[Package Management](https://jfrog.com/learn/devops/package-management/): Software package management explained.

[Software Supply Chain](https://jfrog.com/learn/software-supply-chain/): What is the software supply chain.
